nasb.text: Out of this there shall be for the holy place a square round about five hundred by five hundred cubits, and fifty cubits for its open space round about.

esv.text: Of this a square plot of 500 by 500 cubits shall be for the sanctuary, with fifty cubits for an open space around it.

cnv.text: 其中要有一塊作為聖所之地，長二百五十公尺，寬二百五十公尺，四面見方；周圍再有二十五公尺作空地。

ccb.text: 你们要在其中分出一块长宽各二百五十米的地建圣殿。殿的周围要有二十五米宽的空地。
